summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of OCB TITAN Retail AI System - Indonesian ERP for OCB GROUP. Login, Dashboard, POS, Products, Inventory, Finance, Reports, Branches, Users, and Settings all functional.

issues: Theme is consistently applied with Red/Gold/Dark styling - good design

critical_code_review_comments: All pages properly translated to Indonesian (Bahasa Indonesia)
POS page has data-testid for search input, good for automation
Sidebar navigation uses data-testid attributes for all menu items
Login form has proper data-testid attributes (email-input, password-input, submit-btn)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load and function correctly

seed_data_creation: Test products, customers, suppliers created during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: OCB TITAN Retail AI System is fully functional. All menu items in Indonesian: Dashboard, Kasir (POS), Produk, Stok, Pembelian, Supplier, Pelanggan, Keuangan, Akuntansi, Laporan, Cabang, Pengguna, Pengaturan. Backend tests cover Auth, Dashboard, Products, Inventory, POS, Customers, Suppliers, Branches, Finance, Reports, Users.

features_verified.dashboard: Working - Shows statistics in Indonesian (Penjualan Hari Ini, Laba Hari Ini, etc.)
features_verified.pos_kasir: Working - Product search, cart (Keranjang), payment buttons (BAYAR SEKARANG, Tahan, Batal)
features_verified.products_produk: Working - Product list with Modal, Harga Jual, Min Stok columns. Tambah Produk button
features_verified.inventory_stok: Working - Tabs: Stok Cabang, Stok Menipis, Mutasi Stok, Transfer Cabang. Stok Opname button
features_verified.finance_keuangan: Working - Tabs: Ringkasan, Kas, Pengeluaran. Cards: Penjualan, HPP, Laba Kotor, Laba Bersih
features_verified.reports_laporan: Working - Tabs: Penjualan, Produk, Stok, Cabang, Pelanggan
features_verified.users_pengguna: Working - User list with Role, Cabang, Status, Aksi columns
features_verified.settings_pengaturan: Working - Tabs: Info Toko, POS, Notifikasi, Keamanan, Backup. Store info: OCB GROUP
features_verified.sidebar_navigation: Working - All Indonesian menu items with data-testid attributes
